title: Tesla updates U.S. Supercharger pricing for peak demand windows
headline: Tesla adjusts peak-hour Supercharger pricing in U.S. markets
shortSummary: Tesla has introduced revised time-of-day pricing at select U.S. Supercharger sites to improve stall availability during peak demand. The company says pricing changes are intended to spread charging load and reduce wait times.
bullets: Higher rates apply during specified demand windows
Off-peak discounts remain at many locations
Policy is framed as a congestion-management step
whyItMatters: Pricing signals can influence station utilization and user behavior.

title: CATL announces higher-density LFP pack update for commercial EV fleets
headline: CATL unveils denser LFP battery pack for fleet EVs
shortSummary: CATL presented an LFP pack update aimed at increasing energy density and cycle-life performance for commercial electric fleets. The company says the new pack is designed for lower total cost of ownership over long duty cycles.
bullets: Improved energy density over prior generation
Targeted at buses and urban logistics fleets
whyItMatters: Incremental battery gains can materially improve fleet economics.
